title: Smoky Pork Tacos
description: A delicious and flavorful Mexican-inspired dish featuring smoky pork, perfect for tacos.

ingredients.name: chipotle peppers in adobo sauce
ingredients.notes: depending on desired level of heat

instructions: Season the pork chunks with chili powder, cumin, smoked paprika, and garlic powder.
In a large Dutch oven, heat a couple tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork chunks until browned on all sides, then transfer to the oven.
Braise the pork for 2-3 hours, or until tender.
Meanwhile, chop the onion and sauté it in a pan until softened.
Add the chipotle peppers to the pan and cook for a few minutes.
Shred the pork with two forks and stir in the onion and chipotle mixture.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the pork onto a tortilla and topping with cheese, sour cream, and cilantro.
